decoration.label: Base
decoration.description: Switch to base layer's alpha layout #0.

decoration.label: Alpha
decoration.description: Switch to alpha layout #1.  Beware that macOS mode and bilateral combinations enforcement won't work properly until you switch back to the base layer's alpha layout #0.

decoration.label: Alpha
decoration.description: Switch to alpha layout #2.  Beware that macOS mode and bilateral combinations enforcement won't work properly until you switch back to the base layer's alpha layout #0.

decoration.label: Alpha
decoration.description: Switch to alpha layout #3.  Beware that macOS mode and bilateral combinations enforcement won't work properly until you switch back to the base layer's alpha layout #0.
